propertyGroup:
webURL="https://github.com/xerial/sqlite-jdbc" icon="icons/sqlite_icon.png"
label="INSERT OR REPLACE" description="Insert replace duplicate key value"/> class="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ext.sqlite.model.data.SQLiteValueHandlerProvider" class="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ext.sqlite.auth.LibSQLAuthModelToken"
iconBig="icons/libsql_icon_big.png"
dialect="sqlite"> description="LibSQL DBeaver JDBC driver. Works with standalone LibSQL server and with Turso." changeFolderType="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ext.sqlite.model.SQLiteTableColumn"/>
supportedConfigurationTypes="MANUAL,URL" changeFolderType="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ext.sqlite.model.SQLiteTableForeignKey"/> class="com.dbeaver.jdbc.driver.libsql.LibSqlDriver" label="INSERT OR IGNORE" description="Insert ignore duplicate key value"/>
description="SQLite JDBC driver"
<treeInjection path="generic/catalog/schema/view/attribute" id="libsql_jdbc" supportedConfigurationTypes="MANUAL,URL"
objectType="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ext.sqlite.model.SQLiteView"/>
class="org.sqlite.JDBC" objectType="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ext.sqlite.model.SQLiteTable"/>
singleConnection="true"
sampleURL="jdbc:sqlite:{file}" <driver
<method id="sqLiteInsertIgnore" class="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ext.sqlite.model.SQLiteInsertReplaceMethodIgnore" <datasource iconBig="icons/sqlite_icon_big.png"
description="LibSQL token based authentication" defaultDatabase="http://localhost" embedded="true" defaultPort=""
<manager class="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ext.sqlite.edit.SQLiteTableForeignKeyManager"
label="SQLite" supportedPageFields="server" webURL="https://github.com/tursodatabase/libsql" label="LibSQL Authentication" parent="GenericValueHandlerProvider" objectType="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ext.sqlite.model.SQLiteTableForeignKey"/>
categories="sql,embedded">
changeFolderType="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ext.sqlite.model.SQLiteView"/>
<treeInjection path="generic/catalog/schema/table/attribute" <manager class="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ext.sqlite.edit.SQLiteTableColumnManager" <treeInjection path="generic/catalog/schema/table" id="SQLiteValueHandlerProvider"
description="SQLite data types provider"
class="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ext.sqlite.model.SQLiteDataSourceProvider"
sampleURL="jdbc:dbeaver:libsql:{server}"
changeFolderType="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ext.sqlite.model.SQLiteTable"/> id="libsql_token_jdbc" promoted="1" <meta id="sqlite" class="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ext.sqlite.model.SQLiteMetaModel"
<authModel
default="true"> label="SQLite"
databaseDocumentationSuffixURL="Database-driver-SQLite" <driver
driverClass="org.sqlite.JDBC,com.dbeaver.jdbc.driver.libsql.LibSqlDriver" dialect="sqlite"/>
id="sqlite_jdbc" description="SQLite"
description="SQLite dialect." icon="icons/sqlite_icon.png">
<treeInjection path="generic/catalog/schema/view"
databaseDocumentationSuffixURL="Database-driver-LibSQL"
label="LibSQL" <manager class="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ext.sqlite.edit.SQLiteTableManager" <method id="sqLiteReplaceIgnore" class="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ext.sqlite.model.SQLiteInsertReplaceMethod"
